title: vicia lens subsp. nigricans
intro: Vicia lens subsp. nigricans, also known as black lentil vetch, is a subspecies of the vetch plant, a type of legume native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high content of saponins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Vicia lens subsp. nigricans include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Vicia lens subsp. nigricans include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
